item.title: 洲际交易所推出私募信贷平台，以解决透明度问题
item.description: 纽约证券交易所的母公司洲际交易所周二表示，已推出一款产品，旨在提高私募信贷市场的透明度——这一资产类别正因投资者担忧加剧而备受困扰。【原文：New York Stock Exchange-parent Intercontinental Exchange said on Tuesday it has launched a product to bring greater transparency to the private credit market, an asset ​class beleaguered by heightened investor concerns.】

item.title: 在首席执行官推动复兴计划的背景下，卡夫亨氏将推出高蛋白芝士通心粉
item.description: 卡夫亨氏周二表示，计划推出高蛋白芝士通心粉，这是首席执行官史蒂夫·卡希兰为重振这家包装食品制造商所做努力的一部分，此前该公司已暂停了分拆计划。【原文：Kraft Heinz said on Tuesday it ​plans to launch high-protein Mac & Cheese as ‌part of CEO Steve Cahillane's efforts to revive the packaged food maker after hitting pause on its plans ​to split.】

item.title: 据《The Information》报道，OpenAI将通过亚马逊云服务部门向美国政府机构出售人工智能技术
item.description: 据《The Information》周二报道，OpenAI已签署一项新协议，将通过亚马逊的云计算部门向美国国防和政府机构出售其人工智能模型的使用权，用于处理机密和非机密工作。【原文：OpenAI has signed ​a new deal to sell ‌access to its AI model to U.S. defense and government agencies ​through Amazon's cloud unit ​for classified and unclassified work, the ⁠Information reported on Tuesday.】

item.title: 世界银行表示，过度依赖关税会削弱发展中国家的工业发展势头
item.description: 世界银行周二在一份报告中警告称，发展中国家推行产业政策的力度比富裕国家更大，但许多国家过度依赖关税和补贴等粗放型手段，而这些手段很可能收效甚微。【原文：Developing countries are pursuing industrial policy more aggressively than ​rich nations but many rely too heavily on blunt tools like tariffs and subsidies that ‌are unlikely to work, the World Bank warned in a report on Tuesday.】

item.title: 芯片制造商高通宣布启动200亿美元股票回购计划
item.description: 智能手机芯片设计商高通公司周二宣布了一项200亿美元的股票回购计划，此外，该公司还拥有现有的21亿美元股票回购授权。【原文：Smartphone chip designer ‌Qualcomm on Tuesday unveiled a $20 billion stock ​buyback program, ​in addition to its existing $2.1 ⁠billion share ​repurchase authority.】

item.title: 华纳兄弟首席执行官将从与派拉蒙的交易中获利高达8.87亿美元
item.description: 据周一提交的一份监管文件显示，在华纳兄弟探索公司完成向派拉蒙Skydance的出售后，该公司首席执行官大卫·扎斯拉夫预计将获得高达8.87亿美元的报酬。【原文：Warner Bros Discovery CEO David Zaslav is likely to receive up to $887 ​million after completion of the media ‌company's sale to Paramount Skydance , according to a regulatory filing on Monday.】

item.title: 独家：据信函显示，Jana Partners敦促Six Flags探索出售事宜并更换董事会主席
item.description: 据路透社获得的一封信函显示，激进投资者Jana Partners希望主题公园运营商Six Flags Entertainment考虑出售事宜，并立即任命一位新的董事会主席。【原文：Activist investor Jana Partners wants theme park operator Six Flags Entertainment to ​explore a sale and immediately appoint a new head of its board of directors, according to a letter reviewed by ‌Reuters.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，受伊朗局势影响，麦格理退出科威特输油管道项目
item.description: 据两位知情人士透露，麦格理已退出对科威特价值高达70亿美元的石油管道网络股权的竞标，成为因伊朗战争而退出海湾地区交易的已知首批投资者之一。【原文：Macquarie has withdrawn from bidding for a stake in Kuwait's oil pipeline network worth up ​to $7 billion, two sources familiar with the matter said, becoming one of the first known investors to pull out of ‌a Gulf deal due to the Iran war.】

item.title: 万事达卡将以最高18亿美元收购稳定币基础设施公司BVNK
item.description: 万事达卡周二表示，将以最高18亿美元的价格收购稳定币支付基础设施公司BVNK。【原文：Mastercard said on Tuesday it would ​buy stablecoin payments infrastructure firm ‌BVNK for up to $1.8 billion.】

item.title: 英国议员就导致客户信息泄露的账户故障质询劳埃德银行
item.description: 英国跨党派财政委员会已要求劳埃德银行集团就3月12日发生的技术故障原因作出进一步说明，该故障导致部分客户在该行的数字渠道上看到了其他用户的交易记录。【原文：Britain's cross-party Treasury Committee has requested further explanation from ​Lloyds Banking Group over the causes of a ‌glitch on March 12 that let some customers see other users' transactions on the bank's digital channels.】

item.title: 意大利反垄断监管机构对量子计算领域展开事实调查
item.description: 意大利反垄断机构周二针对量子计算领域启动了一项事实调查，指出该领域存在市场集中、技术锁定以及全球云服务提供商在塑造市场准入方面影响力日益增强等风险。【原文：Italy’s antitrust authority on Tuesday launched a fact‑finding inquiry into the quantum computing sector, citing risks linked to ​market concentration, technological lock‑in and the growing influence of ‌global cloud providers in shaping access.】

item.title: 史赛克公司表示，其网络遭受的网络攻击已得到控制
item.description: 医疗设备制造商史赛克周二表示，已成功遏制了一次导致其业务大面积中断的网络攻击，目前正优先恢复直接支持客户、订单处理及发货的系统。【原文：Medical device maker Stryker said on Tuesday it has contained a ​cyberattack that caused widespread disruption to ‌its business and was now prioritizing restoring systems that directly support customers, ordering and shipping.】

item.title: 英飞凌高管呼吁欧洲建设规模更大、自动化程度更高的晶圆厂
item.description: 英飞凌科技的一位高管上周五表示，欧洲半导体行业必须投资建设更多自动化程度更高、规模更大的300毫米晶圆厂，以应对中国竞争对手在功率和模拟芯片领域日益激烈的竞争。【原文：Europe's semiconductor industry must invest in more automated and larger 300-millimeter wafer fabs to counter growing competition from ​Chinese rivals in power and analog chips, an Infineon ‌Technologies executive said last Friday.】

item.title: 胜利资本提高现金报价，提出新的86亿美元收购雅努斯·亨德森的方案
item.description: 胜利资本周二修订了针对竞争对手詹纳斯·亨德森的86亿美元现金加股票收购要约，以此加大努力，试图阻挠这家资产管理公司与尼尔森·佩尔茨旗下的Trian以及风险投资公司General Catalyst达成的私有化交易。【原文：Victory Capital revised its $8.6 billion cash-and-stock offer for rival Janus Henderson on Tuesday, ratcheting up efforts ​to derail the asset manager's take-private deal with Nelson Peltz's ‌Trian and venture capital firm General Catalyst.】

item.title: 继与Meta和英伟达达成交易后，Nebius计划通过可转换贷款筹集37.5亿美元
item.description: 欧洲最大的人工智能基础设施公司Nebius周二表示，计划通过发行可转换债券筹集37.5亿美元。【原文：Nebius , Europe's largest AI infrastructure ​firm, said on Tuesday it aims ​to raise $3.75 billion via a convertible ⁠loan offering.】

item.title: 达美航空维持第一季度盈利预期，上调营收预期
item.description: 达美航空周二表示，预计第一季度利润将在其最初预测的范围内，但上调了营收预期，原因是中东冲突导致航空燃油价格居高不下。【原文：Delta Air said on Tuesday it expects first-quarter profit within its ​initial forecast range but raised its revenue ‌expectations, amid high jet fuel prices due to the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 蒙特利尔银行将在加利福尼亚州开设130多家新网点
item.description: 蒙特利尔银行周二表示，计划在未来五年内在加利福尼亚州开设超过130家金融中心，并在亚利桑那州开设约15家，旨在继去年出售全美多家分行后，进一步扩大在美国西部的业务版图。【原文：Bank of Montreal said on Tuesday it plans to open more than 130 financial centers in California and about 15 in ​Arizona over the next five years, as it looks to ‌expand presence in the U.S. West following the sale of several branches across the nation last year.】

item.title: 早盘行情：澳大利亚市场震荡
item.description: 今日美国及全球市场关注焦点【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 边疆航空表示正在重新评估全年业绩预测
item.description: 边疆航空周二表示，由于中东冲突导致航空燃油价格急剧上涨，各航空公司正面临严峻挑战，因此该公司正在重新评估其全年业绩预测。【原文：Frontier Airlines said on ​Tuesday that its ‌full-year forecast was under review, as ​carriers grapple ​with a sharp spike ⁠in jet ​fuel prices due ​to the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 美国太平洋舰队将在舰船上部署能攀爬墙壁和飞行的机器人
item.description: 总部位于匹兹堡的Gecko Robotics公司表示，已获得一份价值7100万美元的合同，将在美国海军太平洋舰队的舰船上部署爬墙机器人和人工智能系统。该公司高管称，这是首份授予机器人公司的此类维护合同。【原文：Gecko Robotics has landed a $71 million contract to deploy wall-climbing robots and ​artificial intelligence across U.S. Navy ships in ‌the Pacific Fleet, the Pittsburgh-based company said, in what executives described as a first-of-its-kind maintenance contract awarded to a ​robotics firm.】

item.title: 亚马逊在美国多个城市推出1小时送达服务，以挑战沃尔玛
item.description: 亚马逊正通过在美国各地市场（包括洛杉矶和芝加哥）推出1小时和3小时送达服务，来加速其快速配送服务的发展，这是该公司为抵御最大竞争对手沃尔玛在电子商务领域的竞争所采取的最新举措。【原文：Amazon is ramping up its speedy delivery service by offering 1-hour and 3-hour shipping in markets across the ​U.S., including Los Angeles and Chicago, in its latest efforts to ‌stave off e-commerce competition from its biggest rival Walmart.】

item.title: 美国“暂时性”通胀已满五岁，却依然是个“顽童”
item.description: 本月，美国近几十年来最严重的通胀浪潮已持续五年之久。这场具有决定性意义的经济冲击至今仍在推动政策辩论、影响国家政治，并令美联储官员倍感棘手——他们正试图在通胀率严重偏离目标后，将其回升至2%的目标水平。【原文：The worst U.S. inflation outbreak in a generation turns five years old this month, a defining economic shock that is still driving policy debates, influencing national politics, and frustrating Federal Reserve officials trying to restore the pace of ​price increases to their 2% target after a monumental miss.】

item.title: 智利国家铜业公司月产量骤降，令外界对其2025年底产量激增的预期产生质疑
item.description: 智利国有铜业巨头科德尔科（Codelco）报告称，今年年初产量大幅下滑，这使得铜业分析师和科德尔科前高管对其关于2025年底产量激增的报告提出质疑——正是这一数据帮助该公司实现了年度产量目标。【原文：Chile's state-owned copper giant Codelco has reported a sharp drop in production to start this year, leading copper industry analysts and former Codelco executives to question its reports of surging output at the end of 2025 that helped the company meet its annual production target.】

item.title: 德国计划到2030年将人工智能数据中心数量翻一番
item.description: 德国政府周二表示，该国计划鼓励对数据中心的投资，以使国内数据中心容量至少翻一番，并使人工智能数据处理能力到2030年至少增长四倍。【原文：Germany plans to encourage investments in data centres to at least double domestic capacity and ​to boost artificial intelligence data processing at least ‌fourfold by 2030, the government said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 在美联储会议召开前夕，油价上涨加剧通胀担忧，导致华尔街期货走低
item.description: 周二，美国股指期货小幅走低，因中东局势导致油价维持在每桶100美元附近，加剧了通胀担忧。这将成为美联储当天晚些时候开启为期两天的会议时的主要讨论议题。【原文：U.S. stock index futures slipped on Tuesday as the Middle East conflict pinned oil prices near $100 a ​barrel, fueling inflation concerns that will be a major point of discussion when the Federal Reserve kicks off its ‌two-day meeting later in the day.】

item.title: 霍尼韦尔预计中东冲突将对第一季度业绩造成冲击；维持2026年业绩预期
item.description: 霍尼韦尔国际公司表示，中东冲突可能导致该公司第一季度营收下降一个高个位数的百分比，这预示着伊朗战争可能对航空和能源行业以外的企业盈利产生影响。【原文：Honeywell International said the Middle East conflict could ​hit the company’s first-quarter revenue by ‌a high-single-digit percentage, an early sign of how the Iran war may impact corporate earnings beyond the aviation ​and energy industries.】

item.title: Trustpilot利润增长四倍，该点评平台成为“AI赢家”
item.description: 全球在线评价平台Trustpilot周二表示，其年度利润增长了四倍多，这得益于人工智能搜索工具的推动——这些工具使其网站的点击量激增1490%，并巩固了其作为人工智能模型关键数据源的地位。【原文：Global online review platform Trustpilot said on Tuesday its annual profit more than quadrupled, lifted by AI search ​tools that drove a 1,490% surge in click-throughs to ‌its site and reinforced its role as a key data source for AI models.】

item.title: 花旗集团下调比特币和以太坊12个月目标价，因美国加密货币立法陷入停滞
item.description: 花旗集团下调了对比特币和以太坊的12个月预测，理由是美国立法进程缓慢，这缩小了监管催化剂发挥作用的窗口期——这些催化剂原本有望提振ETF驱动的需求并推动更广泛的机构采用。【原文：Citigroup cut its 12-month forecast for bitcoin and ethereum, citing slow U.S. legislative progress that narrows the window for regulatory catalysts expected to ​boost ETF-driven demand and broader institutional adoption.】

item.title: 英国为光纤宽带部署的最后阶段制定了相关规定
item.description: 英国周二表示，将对英国电信（BT）旗下Openreach公司的全国宽带网络实施为期五年的监管，并对更广泛的网速范围设定价格上限，以促进竞争，并将光纤网络覆盖范围扩展至全国最后五分之一的家庭和商业场所。【原文：Britain said on Tuesday it would regulate BT Openreach's national broadband network ​for another five years, with a ‌price cap on a wider range of speeds, to drive competition and extend fibre connections to ​the final fifth of the country's ​premises.】

item.title: 越南企业竞相申请加密货币牌照，河内计划禁止境外交易
item.description: 随着政府着手限制在海外平台上的交易，越南各家公司正竞相推出该国首批获得许可的加密货币交易所，而越南是全球最活跃的加密货币市场之一。【原文：Vietnamese companies are competing to launch the country's ​first licensed cryptocurrency exchanges as the government moves to curb trading on overseas platforms in one ‌of the world's most active crypto markets.】
